dataset.name: BTC/USD daily close and ATC quantile band snapshot
dataset.description: Daily BTC/USD close prices from 2012 onward with Bitcoin asymmetric tail curvature quantile bands projected through 2051-12-31.
dataset.measurementTechnique: Cowen working paper Table 3 asymmetric tail curvature coefficients and generated BTC/USD daily snapshot.

dashboard.title: Bitcoin ATC Quantile Model Chart | BTC Cowen ATC
dashboard.description: Explore a Bitcoin price model chart using Cowen's asymmetric tail curvature quantile bands, BTC/USD history, projections, and caveats.

fallback.heading: Bitcoin ATC quantile model chart
paragraphs: BTC Cowen ATC visualizes Bitcoin price history against asymmetric tail curvature quantile bands from Benjamin Cowen's working paper.
The dashboard compares BTC/USD daily closes with Q1 through Q99 model bands, projection horizons, and caveats for long-run market structure analysis.

about.title: Bitcoin ATC Quantile Model Methodology | BTC Cowen ATC
about.description: Methodology notes for the Bitcoin ATC quantile model: Cowen paper inputs, BTC/USD data snapshot, projection caveats, and non-trading limits.

fallback.heading: Bitcoin ATC quantile model methodology
paragraphs: This page explains how BTC Cowen ATC uses Cowen's asymmetric tail curvature model, BTC/USD daily close data, and generated quantile bands.
It documents the paper inputs, alternate model comparison modes, projection caveats, and the non-trading limits of the Bitcoin price model chart.
